name: Houdini Action: Custom Python
description: Creates an editable Houdini action with a user-defined Python code block. The code runs inside hython with access to 'hou', 'action', 'os', and 'json'. Use 'action' to read your own parameters. Chain via actions_in/actions_out into a Houdini Headless node. Click 'Edit Script' to open the code editor.

inputs.name: python_code
inputs.default:
# Runs inside hython. Available: hou, action, os, json
# Read custom params from the action dict, e.g. action.get('param1')
print('Hello from custom Houdini action')

python_code:
async def execute(self, inputs):
    actions_in = inputs.get('actions_in') or []
    if not isinstance(actions_in, list):
        actions_in = [actions_in]
    action_name = inputs.get('action_name') or self.get_parameter('action_name', 'custom')
    python_code = self.get_parameter('python_code', '')
    param1 = inputs.get('param1') or self.get_parameter('param1', '')
    param2 = inputs.get('param2') or self.get_parameter('param2', '')
    action = {'type': 'custom_python', 'name': action_name, 'python_code': python_code, 'param1': param1, 'param2': param2}
    actions_out = list(actions_in) + [action]
    self.log_info(f'Added custom_python action -> {action_name}')
    await self.set_output('actions_out', actions_out)
    await self.set_output('exec_out', True)
    return {'actions_out': actions_out}
